title: TPS MONITOR
description: monitors tps and notify console if the server is lagging.
body:
This plugin will monitor tps whilst your server is online and once you server drops to a certain tps it will post lag warnings in console and discord via webhook (soon) 

[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/XWNGN8cAwM) support to this plugin will be added in a few weeks
This will post messages about your servers lagging in a discord channel of your choice.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d559781c72574d497f107026c24e13c29015640.png)
